rules.rule: Never ingest non-Bloodlines material into the Bloodlines knowledge graph.
Preserve richer prior Bloodlines material. Do not replace it with thinner summaries.
Do not reduce Bloodlines to MVP scope or bottlenecked design.
Bloodlines ships as the full canonical design-bible realization in Unity 6.3 LTS with DOTS/ECS. Do not reframe the project as a smaller release.
The browser runtime is frozen as behavioral specification only. Do not add new systems there. Port canon into Unity instead.
The only active Unity work target is unity/ inside the Bloodlines root. Do not work in the Bloodlines URP stub or any alternate Unity surface.
Do not recommend scope cuts, phased-release reduction, or infeasibility framing. Choose the next concrete Unity implementation step instead.
Every recommendation must surface the files that informed it.
Resume from the last good state rather than restarting from a cold plan.
If the local model is not strong enough, decompose the task or mark it for frontier handoff.
Project-artifact writes stay locked until the session unlocks at the required Boss tier.
